ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived (True/False) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (male, female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the passenger (First, Second, Third) */,
  "who" TEXT /* Role of the passenger (man, woman, child) */,
  "adult_male" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is an adult male (True/False) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the passenger's cabin */,
  "embark_town" TEXT /* Town of embarkation */,
  "alive" TEXT /* Whether the passenger survived (yes, no) */,
  "alone" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger traveled alone (True/False) */,
  "alive_n" INTEGER /* Number of passengers alive (1 or 0) */,
  "child_adult" TEXT /* Age category (child, adult) */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Age category 2 (Young Adult, Adult, Elder) */,
  "age_cat2" TEXT /* Age category 3 (Young Adult, Student, Elder) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* The cabin number of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* The unique ticket number of the passenger */,
  "boarding_group" INTEGER /* The boarding group of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* The lifeboat number or identifier if the passenger survived */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* The body identification number if the passenger did not survive */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* The reason for travel (e.g., business, pleasure, relocation) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* The occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status of the passenger (e.g., single, married, widowed) */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* The last known location of the passenger before the sinking */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* The name of the rescue ship if the passenger was rescued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_alive FOREIGN KEY ("alive") REFERENCES survival_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_cat FOREIGN KEY ("age_cat") REFERENCES ages ("age_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_cat2 FOREIGN KEY ("age_cat2") REFERENCES age_categories_2 ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port (C, Q, S) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Name of the age group (child, adult, elder) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category (Young Adult, Adult, Elder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories_2" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category (Young Adult, Student, Elder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival status (yes, no) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* The name of the permission (e.g., view_passenger_data, download_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user ID */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* The permission ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* The passenger ID */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* The name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value of the field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* The user ID who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
